subtitle: Senior Product & Platform Leader -- Multi-Year Roadmap Ownership | Multi-Factor Prioritization | AI-Aware Practice
summary_text: Senior product and platform leader with 8 years of multi-year platform roadmap ownership at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit. Architected MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM evolution from single-product tool to variable multi-product platform, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders, operating an explicit multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governing sprint-over-sprint decisions. Modernized SDLC through full Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints; doubled development throughput). Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development).

Architected platform extensibility from single-product tool to variable multi-product platform -- each product carrying its own matrix of requirements, fees, and support; platform-product thinking applied to a regulated nonprofit context.

Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY; backlog management, sprint governance, and Scrum Master experience during rollout.
Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Owned data-driven product development via DataRobot production ML, embedded BI analytics (Power BI, Tableau), user satisfaction measurement (NPS, post-release surveys), and operational reliability outcomes.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

Agile / SAFe, SDLC Modernization, Scrum Master (Transitional), ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap
Claude API, Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, NPS / User Satisfaction Measurement
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, JIRA, CI/CD
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
